title: When releasing infra changes, I want fleet health proven across sibling endpoints, so I can seal DaaS sprints without false green
job: Run cross-repo health probe and publish PASS witness before marking DaaS friction closed
situation: After staging deploy, terraform apply, or ingress/WAF change affecting multiple repos
motivation: Master audit and launch focus require live substrate proof — not docs-only claims
expectedOutcome: `pnpm daas:fleet:health` PASS; evidence JSON updated under `audit/evidence/cross-repo-health/`
painPoints: IPv4/hostname timeouts on optional external probes
Optional services scaled to zero break fleet counts
Probe failures without in-cluster fallback cause false P0 friction
opportunities: In-cluster kubectl exec fallback for optional probes
Friction register auto-sync from probe output
4/4 PASS as DAAS sprint seal criterion
acceptanceCriteria: `pnpm daas:fleet:health` exits 0 with documented PASS count
Open P0 friction in `pm/friction-register.json` is zero or explicitly linked to non-infra blocker
`validate-all` gate count matches repo manifest (55/55 at 2026-06-10)
nonGoals: Production fleet probe without change window
